name: Xinjiang Tianshan Cement Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Tianshan Cement Co., Ltd. produces and sells cement, clinker, and commercial concrete in China and internationally. It offers anti-sulfate cement, meso thermal Portland cement, low thermal slag Portland cement, road Portland cement, oil well cement, white cement, and colored cement for industrial, agricultural, water conservancy, transportation, military, civil, and other construction projects; cement products; and various prestressed and self-reinforced concrete components. The company also provides high-strength concrete, various grades of high performance concrete, steel fiber concrete, pervious concrete, impervious concrete, antifreeze concrete, fireproof concrete, and other special concrete products for ordinary and high-rise construction, roads, tunnels, viaducts, subway, and other projects. It is also involved in the waste heat power generation business. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Urumqi, China.
